channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kebbi Couple Murdered, Police Investigate
item.description: For Asarara village inside Jega Local Government Area, tragedy don strike as middle-aged man Muhammad Haruna and him wife Habiba Abubakar were brutally killed inside their home around 5:30 a.m. on Sat...

item.title: ‘Almost Us’ Review: A Fresh Gen Z Take on Friend-Zoned Romance
item.description: The film 'Almost Us' offers a modern twist on the classic friend-zone story, appealing especially to the Gen Z audience. With performances by Fyang Smith and JM Ibarra, the movie explores the emotiona...

item.title: Pakistan Commemorates First Anniversary of Marka-e-Haq with Nationwide Tributes to Armed Forces
item.description: Pakistan is observing the first anniversary of Marka-e-Haq, marking the 19-day military confrontation with India from April 22 to May 10, 2025. Across the country, various rallies and ceremonies have ...

item.title: Pakistan and Bangladesh Agree on Joint Measures to Counter Drug Trafficking and Strengthen Security Cooperation
item.description: Pakistan and Bangladesh have taken a significant step to combat the growing menace of drug trafficking and abuse in the region. Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi of Pakistan met with his Bangladeshi coun...

item.title: MK Stalin Criticises Congress Exit, Appreciates Support from Left and VCK Amid Tamil Nadu Election Outcome
item.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister MK Stalin expressed strong disapproval of the Congress party for abruptly ending its long-standing alliance with the Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK), describing it as a sudde...

item.title: Ex-firefighter charged with attempted murder after driving to former partner’s family home
item.description: Brian J. Lanzim, 37, a former firefighter, has been charged with multiple offences after allegedly driving eight hours from Bangor, Maine, to South Toms River, New Jersey, with firearms, ammunition, a...

item.title: Evacuation of hantavirus-affected cruise ship disrupted in Canary Islands
item.description: An operation to evacuate passengers from the MV Hondius cruise ship has been disrupted after concerns over a hantavirus outbreak onboard. The vessel, which was carrying passengers in waters linked to ...

item.title: PMD Forecasts Rain and Thunderstorms in Northern Pakistan Until May 12
item.description: The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) has issued a weather advisory predicting rain, dust storms, and thunderstorms in the upper regions of the country from May 10 to May 12 due to a fresh west...

item.title: Man Arrested for Samurai Sword Attack Outside Venice Apartment Complex
item.description: A violent incident occurred outside Venice Community Housing on Rose Avenue when a man attacked another with a samurai sword, nearly severing his arm. The victim, a 27-year-old man not residing in the...

item.title: Ngema elected DA KwaZulu-Natal leader as party gears up for local elections
item.description: Sithembiso Ngema has been elected as the new provincial leader of the Democratic Alliance (DA) in KwaZulu-Natal, taking over from Francois Rodgers at a conference held in Durban. Rodgers, who dedicate...

item.title: One Nation wins Farrer byelection, ending 77-year Liberal hold
item.description: In a significant political upset, One Nation has won the Farrer byelection, capturing a regional NSW seat from the Liberal Party for the first time in 77 years. Pauline Hanson's party celebrated the v...

item.title: Ongoing Developments in the Middle East Conflict as of May 10, 2026
item.description: The situation in the Middle East continues to escalate as tensions remain high between key nations in the region. As of May 10, 2026, significant developments are being closely monitored, particularly...

item.title: How a Playful Exchange Marked the Start of a Lifelong Relationship
item.description: Mitch Cairns recounts the first time he met fellow artist Agatha Gothe-Snape in 2007 at a Christmas group show in Sydney. Struck by her striking presence, he was drawn not only to her artistic talent ...

item.title: Truphena Muthoni Breaks Tree-Hugging Record in Brazil, Inspires Global Conservation
item.description: Truphena Muthoni, a young Kenyan environmentalist and two-time world record holder, has amazed Kenyans once again by surpassing her tree-hugging goal in Brazil. She aimed to hug 1,172 trees within one...

item.title: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy Films Family Reality Show Amid Ethics Concerns
item.description: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy has returned to his reality TV background with a new five-part series titled 'The Great American Road Trip,' filmed with his family over seven months. The show, set...

item.title: HEC introduces framework for dual, double, and joint degrees with foreign universities
item.description: The Higher Education Commission (HEC) of Pakistan has approved a new policy concerning dual, double, and joint degree programmes in collaboration with recognised foreign and local universities. This s...

item.title: Comelec investigates alleged vote buying involving Leandro Leviste
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has launched a fact-finding investigation following the circulation of a viral video allegedly showing Batangas First District Representative Leandro Leviste dist...

item.title: Two-Year-Old Tragically Dies After Ottawa River Rescue
item.description: A two-year-old child has tragically died after being pulled from the Ottawa River on the evening of Friday, May 8, 2026. Ottawa police were alerted to the situation just before 7 p.m. near the Kichi Z...

item.title: Exploring Jack Vance’s Regional Crime Mystery Through the Eyes of Sheriff Joe Bain
item.description: The Fox Valley Murders, a 1966 crime novel by Jack Vance, combines nostalgia with vivid depictions of Californian towns and countryside, offering a deeply engaging regional mystery. The story follows ...

item.title: This Week in Security: Vulnerable Robot Lawn Mowers, Meta Reverses Instagram Encryption, and Global Cyber Threats
item.description: This week’s cybersecurity news highlights several major concerns for both individuals and governments. A security researcher discovered critical vulnerabilities in Yarbo’s $5,000 multifunction robot l...
